narrative:
Achraf Hakimi is a dynamic Right-Back for Morocco. His overall rating of 7.37/10 places him among the top 2% of right-backs at this tournament. This rating is influenced by 60% club form and 40% World Cup performance.

Hakimi showcases exceptional offensive output, registering 0.333 goals and 0.333 assists per 90 minutes at this World Cup. He creates chances frequently, evidenced by 4.0 key passes and 2.667 shots per 90 minutes. His expected goals of 0.612 per 90 minutes highlight his significant attacking threat from the right-back position.

Hakimi is clearly a pivotal attacking outlet for Morocco, providing crucial width and direct threat from the right flank. Scouts should continue to monitor his consistent offensive contributions, particularly his high volume of key passes and shots. His ability to maintain such high attacking numbers across 270 World Cup minutes will be key in future matches.
